---
# Copy blocks into post .qmd bodies.
# Rule: all multimedia inside .media-container--{large|medium|small}
# Template file — not rendered as a post.
---

## Large — clickable thumbnail

```{=html}
<div class="media-container media-container--large">
  <a href="FULL_PAGE_URL">
    <img src="assets/thumb.png" alt="Short description"/>
  </a>
</div>
```

## Large — image only

```{=html}
<div class="media-container media-container--large">
  <img src="assets/figure.png" alt="Short description"/>
</div>
```
